issue_title: Filename meta string not rendering on code blocks
issue_body_preview:
Having trouble displaying a title on code blocks. Not entirely sure if this is an issue with rehype-pretty-code though.

Sample Markdown:

````md
```js filename="terminal"
console.log('hello, world')
```
````

Results:

![CleanShot 2023-01-16 at 12 42 34](https://user-images.githubuserco
test_description_zh: 在 Nextra 项目的 MDX 页面中，添加一个带有 filename 元字符串的代码块（例如 ```js filename="terminal"），查看渲染后的代码块是否在顶部显示文件名标题。
expected_result_zh: 代码块顶部应正确渲染并显示 filename 元字符串指定的标题（如 "terminal"），标题区域可见且样式正常。
